description: Format the raw restaurant menu in /home/ga/Documents/menu_raw.docx into a professional layout. Center the restaurant name and location lines. Apply 'Heading 2' style to the six category headings (Starters, Soups & Salads, Entrées, Sides, Desserts, Beverages). For each menu item, use a right-aligned tab stop with dot leaders to align the price to the right margin. Move item descriptions to a new line below the item name, removing the parentheses and formatting the text in italics. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/menu_formatted.docx.
